div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Need a Dataverse Web API bearer token

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET + client id + tenant id
all present in the environment?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLIENT CREDENTIALS
POST login.microsoftonline.com/TENANT/oauth2/v2.0/token
scope = https://ORG.crm.dynamics.com/.default
Unattended / CI path. This is what existing scripts use.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
az installed AND logged into the right tenant?
(az account show succeeds)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AZURE CLI (clean + supported)
az account get-access-token
--resource https://ORG.crm.dynamics.com
--query accessToken -o tsv

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
pac authenticated right now?
(pac auth list shows an active profile)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PAC's MSAL CACHE — fastest given PAC works
deserialize tokencache_msalv3.dat with msal,
acquire_token_silent, scope ORG/.default.
Plaintext on Linux/macOS; DPAPI-encrypted on Windows.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
INTERACTIVE / DEVICE CODE (last resort)
msal PublicClientApplication, device-code flow,
scope = https://ORG.crm.dynamics.com/user_impersonation
Needs a human at a browser.
